compiled_state.title: [ticket-graph/_links.py]: _push_tickets_branch duplicated in bash and Python — consider delegating to bash via subprocess
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The _push_tickets_branch function is duplicated between ticket-lib.sh (bash) and ticket_graph/_links.py (Python). Future changes to the push logic must be applied in two places. The Python version could ideally delegate to the bash version via subprocess rather than re-implementing the logic.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_graph/_links.py
Category: design

comments.body: Classification: behavioral/design. Category: design, no broken behavior. Gate 1b: feature-request language detected ('consider delegating'). Escalating to user.
comments.author: Worktree

comments.body: Gate 1b: feature-request language detected ('consider delegating to bash via subprocess') — this is a design improvement suggestion, not broken behavior. Leaving OPEN pending user response on whether to (1) close as feature request, (2) convert to epic, or (3) proceed with investigation.
comments.author: Worktree

comments.body: Classification confirmed: this is a design improvement suggestion ('consider delegating'), not a behavioral bug. No code is broken. Leaving OPEN for user to decide: (1) close as feature request, (2) convert to tech-debt epic, or (3) accept as-is.
